summary: Completed frontend testing of Slot Manager redesign. All 12 features tested and working correctly.

issues: Service 3 doesn't display duration (shows only ₹600) - likely missing duration_min in database

action_items: Consider adding duration_min to Service 3 in database for consistency
critical_code_review_comments: SlotManagement.js is well-structured with separate components for Day/Week/Month views
Multi-service selection logic correctly calculates total duration and price
Timeline click handler correctly calculates time from click position
End time calculation is correct (start time + total duration)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Slot Manager redesign complete. Day/Week/Month views working. Multi-service selection working with correct calculations. Service 3 missing duration_min in database.

day_view_timeline.details: Day view shows vertical timeline with time markers (10:00 am - 9:00 pm in 30-min intervals), resource columns with 'Xh booked' indicator

week_view_7_days.details: Week view shows 7 days (Sun-Sat) with booking counts per day and booking cards

month_view_calendar.details: Month view shows calendar grid with weekday headers and booking count badges

day_button.details: Day button switches to Day view correctly

week_button.details: Week button switches to Week view correctly

month_button.details: Month button switches to Month view correctly

today_button.details: Today button navigates to current date

multi_service_badge_header.details: Purple 'Multi-Service' badge visible in Slot Manager header when config has allow_multiple_services=true

multi_service_badge_modal.details: Purple 'Multi-service enabled' badge visible in booking modal

multiple_services_selection.details: Can select multiple services in booking modal - all 3 services can be selected simultaneously

total_duration_calculation.details: Total Duration correctly calculated: Service 1 (15 mins) + Service 2 (30 mins) = 45 mins, all 3 = 90 mins

total_price_calculation.details: Total Price correctly calculated: Service 1 (₹200) + Service 2 (₹400) = ₹600, all 3 = ₹1200

end_time_calculation.details: End Time correctly calculated from start time + total duration (e.g., 21:45 + 90 mins = 23:15)

timeline_click_opens_modal.details: Clicking on timeline opens booking modal with correct time based on click position (e.g., clicked at 30% down = 13:30)

screenshots_taken: 19_day_view_from_week.png - Day view after clicking day in Week view

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real MongoDB database
